title: Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9--OF THE SUCCESSIONS OF PERSONS

DOMICILIATED OUT OF THE STATE, AND OF THE TAX DUE BY

FOREIGN HEIRS, LEGATEES AND DONEES SECTION 1--OF THE

SUCCESSIONS OF PERSONS DOMICILIATED OUT OF THE STATE

Art. 1220.  Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
